task_completion.description: Verify the unit group 'Agricultural Area-Time' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Agricultural Area-Time' in the openLCA Navigation pane under 'Unit groups', or an open editor tab with this name.

task_completion.description: Verify 'ha*season' is added as the reference unit with a factor of 1.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Agricultural Area-Time' unit group editor, 'ha*season' should be listed in the Units table, marked as the reference unit, and have a conversion factor of exactly 1.0.

task_completion.description: Verify 'ac*season' is added with a factor of 0.404686.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Agricultural Area-Time' unit group editor, 'ac*season' should be listed in the Units table with a conversion factor of approximately 0.404686 (tolerance of 0.001 is acceptable).

task_completion.description: Verify 'ha*yr' is added with a factor of 3.0.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Agricultural Area-Time' unit group editor, 'ha*yr' should be listed in the Units table with a conversion factor of 3.0 (tolerance of 0.1 is acceptable).

task_completion.description: Verify the flow property 'Irrigated area-time' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Irrigated area-time' in the openLCA Navigation pane under 'Flow properties', or an open editor tab with this name.

task_completion.description: Verify the flow property 'Irrigated area-time' uses the 'Agricultural Area-Time' unit group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Irrigated area-time' flow property editor, the 'Unit group' field must be set to 'Agricultural Area-Time'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the openLCA graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the openLCA application windows, menus, and forms, rather than a terminal, script editor, or database browser.

integrity.description: Verify the entities are genuinely created within the openLCA database structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: The created unit group and flow property should appear in the standard openLCA Navigation tree on the left side of the screen, indicating they are saved in the active database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text file or unrelated application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Agricultural Area-Time', 'Irrigated area-time', and the unit factors must be visible inside the specific openLCA input fields and tables, not in a generic text editor like Notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target unit group is 'Agricultural Area-Time'. It must contain three units: 'ha*season' (reference unit, factor 1.0), 'ac*season' (factor 0.404686, acceptable tolerance 0.001), and 'ha*yr' (factor 3.0, acceptable tolerance 0.1). The target flow property is 'Irrigated area-time', which must be assigned the 'Agricultural Area-Time' unit group.
